name: Mescalero Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the beer and water into a large pot and bring to a boil.
2. Add the oyster sauce, abscis sauce, and salt to taste.
3. Fry the meat until browned, then add it to the pot.
4. Sauté the onions and bell peppers in the meat grease and add them to the pot.
5. Stir in the tomato paste and all other ingredients.
6. Cook for 45 minutes, stirring often.
